Product Manager · Payments & Platform Products

Ankit
Arora

8+ years pioneering scalable products in fintech, e‑commerce & data platforms. Patent holder. Bocconian (Milan, Italy). MBA Bocconi.

Payments E-commerce Platform Products AI & Prototyping Product Mentor
↓ Download CV View Experience
01 — About

Product thinker.
Outcome obsessed.

I’m Ankit Arora — a Product Manager with over 8 years of dedicated expertise in fintech, e-commerce, and data platforms. My career has been defined by pioneering innovative solutions that drive growth and efficiency on a global scale.

I love digging into customer problems and solving them with modern technology. I lead large-scale payments and platform products in the Deluxe ecosystem via UST — including EMV device management, digital wallets, and the dlxPay mobile app.

At Rakuten I launched the Annotation Platform across 4 geographies, spearheaded AI-powered automation initiatives, and drove significant cost savings. My approach is firmly rooted in data-driven decision-making and cross-functional collaboration — working with teams across Japan, Europe, and the USA.

⚙
AI-powered builder: I actively prototype and experiment with AI tools — from LLM-powered workflows and automated slide generation to AI-based data classification. I believe the best PMs today are hands-on with AI, not just spec-ing it out.

Outside of work, I actively mentor aspiring PMs on topmate.io, conducting mock interviews and guiding career transitions into product management.

📄
Patent Holder
System and Methods for Next Generation Annotation Platform for Machine Learning
Patent No. 81285350 · Issued Jun 5, 2025
~65–70%
Reduction in manual processing using AI-based classification at Rakuten
~70%
Faster merchant onboarding through self-service workflows
150×
Efficiency improvement in CSM workflows via automated ROI slide generation
$500K+
Annualized payment volume driven through Fortellis/CDK integration
02 — Experience

Where I’ve built things.

UST Global
Gurugram · Hybrid
Dec 2023 – Present
Full-time · 2+ yrs
Client — Deluxe   Product Manager
  • Expanded merchant payment capabilities with digital wallets and recurring payments — adopted by ~25% of active merchants within 6 months.
  • Led Fortellis (CDK) integration, North America’s largest automotive dealer platform — onboarded 20+ merchants in Phase-1, driving ~$500K in annualized payment volume.
  • Owned EMV Device Management — real-time terminal routing reducing transaction failures by ~8–12%.
  • Co-led dlxPay mobile app launch contributing ~10% of total payment volume within 6 months.
Client — Augury   Product Manager
  • Launched a Value Calculator enabling CSMs to quantify ROI — secured 10+ enterprise onboardings.
  • Built automated win-story and ROI slide generation — improving CSM efficiency by ~150×.
topmate.io
Remote
Aug 2023 – Present
Freelance · 2+ yrs
Product Mentor
  • Conducted mock interviews helping individuals excel in PM hiring processes.
  • Guided aspiring PMs and career-switchers with practical advice and skill-building frameworks.
Rakuten International
California, USA
Aug 2022 – Aug 2023
Full-time · 1 yr
Product Manager
  • Optimized end-to-end item data processing — ~$25K annual cost savings.
  • Reduced manual processing by ~65–70% using AI — team handled ~3× higher item volumes without additional headcount.
Rakuten India
Bengaluru, India
Jul 2019 – Jul 2022
Full-time · 3 yrs
Product Manager II & Product Manager
  • Launched Rakuten’s first Annotation Platform across 4 geographies — boosted efficiency 60%, leading to a patent.
  • Delivered Merchant Central MVP — reduced onboarding time by ~70% via self-service workflows.
  • Built a centralized partner platform — improved operational efficiency by ~40%.
  • Shipped Brand Management standardizing 30K+ brands. Anti-fraud MVP saving ~$50K/yr.
Associate Product Manager
  • Designed internal editing tools reducing operational handling time by ~30%.
  • Conducted customer interviews to define MVP requirements for self-serve merchant feed management.
Max Life Insurance
Gurgaon, India
Apr 2018 – May 2018
Internship
Digital Product Management Intern
  • Designed the Max Life Insurance app MVP — contributed to 20% user base growth.
  • Authored a white paper on global digitization in the insurance industry.
Advance Sales Corporation
Jamshedpur
Jan 2016 – Feb 2017
Full-time
Business Development Associate
  • Built business cases driving a ₹2M revenue increase (~30% growth) in target segment.
  • Negotiated pricing & margin analytics with principal companies.
Wipro Technologies
Greater Noida
Jun 2015 – Dec 2015
Full-time
Project Engineer
  • Configured LTE, WCDMA, GSM nodes for Ericsson with API syncing & integration.
  • Automated testing reducing manual workload by 60%.

06 — What colleagues say

20 LinkedIn recommendations.

Ankit is a highly motivated and intelligent individual who consistently exceeded expectations. His ability to rapidly grasp complex concepts and adapt to new challenges is truly impressive. One of his most notable achievements was successfully onboarding remotely to a large, multifaceted product and quickly building strong relationships with team members worldwide.

Shuky Aharonovitch
Product @ Cinch, automating logistics workflows with AI
Managed Ankit directly · Augury · Dec 2024

Ankit consistently demonstrated great work ethic, collaborative, awesome attitude, and overall very professional. Ankit would be a great addition to any team!

Brielle Fragale
Global Head of Customer Success @ Augury
Same team · Dec 2024

Ankit is a seasoned Product Manager who understands product visioning, strategy and execution with his teams. His ability to focus on what’s important and apply sound prioritisation and decision making frameworks is key to his rise.

Naveen Athresh
Builder — Agentic AI | 2× TEDx Speaker | Ex-Rakuten, eBay, Flipkart
Managed Ankit directly · Nov 2020

Ankit is an outstanding product manager with a deep understanding of the product development lifecycle. He translates complex business requirements into specific product requirements and communicates complex ideas to stakeholders at all levels.

Jun Wu
Senior Software Engineer at Rakuten
Same team · Jul 2023

Ankit is a passionate professional with creative thinking and a clear thought process. He always looks forward to the big picture, breaks it down into smaller chunks, and closes systematically with a clear strategic approach — a well-organised asset to any team.

Aarti Rajput
Product Leader | E-commerce, Banking & ILM
Same team · Jul 2022

His sharp listening & grasping skills multiplexed with strong design thinking gave him the boost to perform as a senior PDM even in the early stages of his career. Impressed with his meticulous documentation and perseverance to unblock engineering.

Shivakumar Dorai
Data Platform Capabilities | Rakuten
Same team · Jul 2022
